all.critique:
Overall, the analysis is quite thorough and clearly explains the intended behavior of the DatasetLoader. That said, there are a few points that could be clarified or expanded upon:

1. Tokenization Rounding and Edge Cases  
 • The analysis describes computing token_count using floor((H/8) / patch_size) and floor((W/8) / patch_size). However, it does not explicitly address what happens when H or W are not evenly divisible by 8 or by patch_size. Although using floor division is common, it might be
